description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house set on a landscaped lot with a large backyard, a swimming pool, and a detached garage. The main building features clean, rectangular lines, flat roofs, and a mix of white and gray exterior finishes, complemented by large windows and green garden spaces. The property is bordered by a low wall and includes a driveway leading to the garage. The backyard is spacious, with a pool, patio, and several palm trees, while the front yard is neatly landscaped with shrubs and decorative elements. Adjacent to the house is a large plot of land with a canal or water feature running alongside, lined with evenly spaced palm trees. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living, geometric forms, and a blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large windows, a detached garage, landscaped gardens, and a backyard pool, set beside a canal and palm-lined lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, detached garage, landscaped front yard, and the canal with palm trees in the background.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the driveway, garage, side garden, and the pool area behind the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, patio, and the canal with palm trees in the foreground.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the pool, patio, and the open green spaces around the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, and a minimalist door flanked by landscaped planters
